final_prompt.prompt:
Design a PPT cover slide for an automotive product launch announcement.

Style/medium: needs a premium automotive launch aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include space for main title and subtitle placement
Subject: must include the vehicle model "长安起源Q06" as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a transparent, breathtaking background direction — exact visual treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs an impactful, premium atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a brand-appropriate direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06将于9月上市" as the main title
Constraints: must preserve the September launch timing information
Avoid:
